name: One Line Draw
author: Poki
description: One Line Draw is a puzzle game where your goal is simple: complete the pattern using just one line! Find the perfect starting point, plan your path, and draw without lifting your finger or retracing your steps. Every move counts, so think ahead and stay sharp. Can you master the art of the single stroke? How to play One Line Draw? Click and hold to draw. Who created One Line Draw? One Line Draw is created by Unico Studio.
